state_update_blocked_by_validator_contra.reason: scripts/validate_active_context_state.py and README.md still hard-require the live mirror phrase next_phase: PURG04_TRACK_A_PATCH_REVIEW_AND_MERGE_DECISION, so advancing ACTIVE_CONTEXT_STATE.json here would create out-of-scope validator drift.

artifact_sha256.self_hash_limitation: The terminal file sha256 is reported externally after write because a file cannot embed its own final sha256 without self-reference drift.
